Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.

Interfaces in this package may be implemented but not be extended (because methods contain a fixed return type).

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    ArrayValidator<A,​E>
    Validates the requirements of an array of elements.
    ArrayVerifier<A,​E>
    Verifies the requirements of an array.
    BigDecimalPrecisionValidator
    Validates the requirements of a BigDecimal.precision().
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal.precision().
    BigDecimalValidator
    Validates the requirements of a BigDecimal value.
    BigDecimalVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal value.
    BooleanValidator
    Validates the requirements of a boolean value.
    BooleanVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a boolean value.
    ClassValidator<T>
    Validates the requirements of a Class value.
    ClassVerifier<T>
    Verifies the requirements of a Class value.
    CollectionValidator<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
    Validates the requirements of a Collection.
    CollectionVerifier<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
    Verifies the requirements of a Collection.
    ComparableValidator<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a Comparable.
    ComparableVerifier<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a Comparable.
    Configuration
    Configures the behavior of a single verifier.
    FloatingPointValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a floating-point number.
    FloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a floating-point number.
    InetAddressValidator
    Validates the requirements of an IP address or hostname.
    InetAddressVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of an IP address or hostname.
    IntegerValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of an integer number.
    IntegerVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of an integer number.
    JavaRequirements
    Verifies the requirements of types from the Java core API.
    ListValidator<L extends List<E>,​E>
    Validates the requirements of a List.
    ListVerifier<L,​E>
    Verifies the requirements of a list.
    MapValidator<K,​V>
    Validates the requirements of a Map.
    MapVerifier<K,​V>
    Verifies the requirements of a Map.
    NumberValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of for a Number.
    NumberVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of for a Number.
    ObjectValidator<T>
    Validates the requirements of an Object.
    ObjectVerifier<T>
    Verifies the requirements of an Object.
    OptionalValidator
    Validates the requirements of an Optional.
    OptionalVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of an Optional.
    PathValidator
    Validates the requirements of a Path.
    PathVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a Path.
    PrimitiveBooleanValidator
    Validates the requirements of a primitive boolean value.
    PrimitiveBooleanVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive boolean value.
    PrimitiveCharacterValidator
    Validates the requirements of a Comparable value.
    PrimitiveCharacterVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a Comparable value.
    PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a primitive floating-point number.
    PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive floating-point number.
    PrimitiveIntegerValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a primitive integer number.
    PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive integer number.
    PrimitiveNumberValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Validates the requirements of a primitive number (e.g.
    PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive number (e.g.
    SizeValidator
    Validates the requirements of the size of a collection.
    SizeVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of the size of a collection.
    StringValidator
    Validates the requirements of a String.
    StringVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a String.
    UriValidator
    Validates the requirements of a URI.
    UriVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a URI.
    UrlValidator
    Validates the requirements of a URL.
    UrlVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a URL.
    ValidationFailure
    A failed validation.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    DefaultJavaRequirements
    Default implementation of JavaRequirements.
    GlobalRequirements
    The global configuration inherited by all verifiers.
    ThreadRequirements
    Configures the behavior of all verifiers invoked by the current thread.
